narrative:
Olmsted Township-00-G (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,063 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.6 percentage points.
